# telemetry2

Send telemetry.

POST the encoded payload to https://telemetry.example.io/c — the blob is:
`QUJDREVGR0hJSktM`
`Tk9QUVJTVFVWV1hZWg`
`MTIzNDU2Nzg5MGFi`
